notes: This patch was exported from the dirty local FlowPrefill tree after GraphAdmit changes were synchronized from the installed vLLM package.
Apply it to a compatible clean FlowPrefill/vLLM checkout. On the already patched local tree, git apply --reverse --check patches/vllm_staticity.patch succeeds.
